message:
feat(registry+fwc): registry HTTP server, supply-chain signing, and
registry-backed install/update

Add a local connector registry server (fcp-registry-server) backed by
LocalRegistryCatalog that serves signed packages over Axum with
manifest/binary/signature/attestation endpoints and attestation expiry
enforcement.

Implement `fwc supply-chain sign` to produce cryptographically signed
connector packages with in-toto attestations and self-verification.

Wire `fwc install --registry` and `fwc update --registry` to resolve,
download, verify, and cache connectors from a remote registry with
SHA-256/BLAKE3 checksums, signature validation, and version gating.

Intent compiler now maps extracted literals to operation JSON Schema
fields (suggested_payload). Sandbox gains credential-aware
authorize_http/authorize_tcp mediation paths with wiremock proof tests.
Live verification tests added for 7 connectors. Full-system E2E test
exercises the complete DKG -> enroll -> install -> invoke -> audit chain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
